---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Vyral Forge
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this would solve
What's frustrating right now? What would this feature unlock?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about, and why they don't fit.

## Use case context
- What niche are you working in?
- Which part of the pipeline does this affect (scraper / analyzer / planner / UI)?
- Is this for solo use or team / VA workflow?

## Additional context
Screenshots, links, related projects.
